name: Independence Power Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Corporate History and Background The Company Independence Power Holdings, Inc. (f/k/a TriUnity Business Services Limited, the Company and, prior to the Merger (as defined herein), TriUnity), was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on April 30, 2024. Prior to the Merger, TriUnity was headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia and provided business related services such as accounting and bookkeeping, human resources management, payroll, administrative support, head-hunting and r...
